editor_layers.display_role: Elevation, slope, bank breaks, boulder shadows, and terrain confidence backdrop.
Visible channel, banks, boulders, foam texture, water masks, and access context.
Derived NHD mainstem candidate, source flowlines, future reviewed centerline, stationing, flow direction, and named/access hydrography context.
Review-gated cross-section seed lines, future bank offsets, width, slope, constriction, and solver section sampling.
Flow bands, discharge/stage context, season notes, and validation-flow selection.
Label-specific flow response, difficulty controls, solver parameters, and expected raft outcomes.
Provenance, rights, artifact paths, confidence, and source-status review.
Automated slope/constriction/roughness/imagery tags and human review labels.
Guide feedback, footage pointers, scout notes, expected outcomes, and review status.
Accepted pins, spans, polygons, raft lines, expected outcomes, and rights metadata.

editor_panels.purpose: Primary rapid-design view with terrain, imagery, hydrography, candidates, and evidence overlays.
editor_panels.title: Map Review

editor_panels.purpose: Longitudinal elevation/gradient profile plus selected cross-section context.
editor_panels.title: Station Profile

editor_panels.purpose: Gauge bands, source provenance, rights, and confidence for the selected candidate.
editor_panels.title: Flow And Sources

editor_panels.purpose: Manual edits for labels, boundaries, raft lines, expected outcomes, confidence, and rights.
editor_panels.title: Annotation Editor

flow_bands.notes: Lower training-oriented flow; expect exposed rocks, shallows, and slower recovery from mistakes.
Default validation band for intermediate commercial-style runs.
Higher consequence preset with stronger holes, wave trains, eddy-line shear, and faster raft response.

quality_gates: Every accepted rapid has DEM/lidar, imagery, flowline, cross-section, gauge, source-manifest, candidate-tag, and guide-note context visible in the one-view layout.
Every accepted annotation records rights/provenance before it can feed validation or Unreal data assets.
Guidebook text, third-party imagery, and field media remain referenced through manifests unless redistribution rights are explicit.
Every reviewed rapid in the first pass must link low, median, and high flow bands to stitched validation overlays.
Every reviewed rapid must keep guide feedback as manifest references until rights and field-media provenance are explicit.
Validation overlays must remain whole-window stitched outputs, not isolated reach-local signoff artifacts.
